title: EMERGENCY: Fix payment settlement batch deadlock
author: Dave Evans
comments: Post-deploy review completed by Bob Chen (Senior) on Nov 6 at 14:00. Findings: Fix correctly resolves row-level lock contention in settlement_batch_processor by adding ORDER BY account_id to prevent deadlock. No regressions identified. Follow-up: add deadlock detection test (PR-7812). Regression risk: Low — change is localized to lock ordering.

title: EMERGENCY: Fix transaction rounding error in settlement totals
author: Alice Nakamura
comments: Emergency fix deployed at 03:15 UTC during overnight batch processing failure. VP Engineering (Michael Chang) authorized via phone at 02:45 UTC. Fix changes rounding mode from HALF_UP to HALF_EVEN for settlement total aggregation to match bank reconciliation expectations. No post-deploy review performed as of Dec 29. Code changed: SettlementAggregator.java lines 145-152.
